title: History scholar Kantrowitz awarded Andrew Carnegie Fellowship
summary_en: Kantrowitz is one of 24 scholars the Carnegie Corporation of New York selected from among 381 nominations across the country.
title_cn: 历史学学者坎特罗维茨获颁安德鲁·卡内基研究员奖
summary_cn: 近日，历史学领域学者坎特罗维茨获颁安德鲁·卡内基研究员奖。该奖项是人文社科与教育领域具有较高影响力的国际性学术奖项，主要面向相关领域优秀学者设立。

title: UW’s Public Tech Media Lab helps bridge the gap between AI and journalism
summary_en: Led by journalism professor Tomás Dodds, the new lab has partnered with local newsrooms to help them develop AI guidelines and systems that adhere to core reporting values and standards.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学公共技术媒体实验室助力弥合人工智能与新闻业鸿沟
summary_cn: 近期，美国华盛顿大学公共技术媒体实验室启动实施人工智能与新闻业跨界对接专项工作，着力破解两大领域融合发展存在的壁垒问题，相关工作得到教育、科技、新闻等领域的广泛关注。

title: UW–Madison finalizes 2025–27 compensation strategy
summary_en: The strategy is intended to support the university’s total compensation philosophy, which is to be a market-competitive employer that supports UW staff and faculty.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校敲定2025—2027年薪酬策略

title: Badgers head to Wisconsin’s capitol
summary_en: The annual UW–Madison Day at the State Capitol highlighted the university's economic power and campus momentum.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学代表赴威斯康星州议会大厦

title: 48 faculty honored with Vilas professorships and awards
summary_en: The awards recognize standout research, teaching and service.
title_cn: 48名教职人员荣获维拉兹教席及相关奖项

title: 4 UW scholars honored with Vilas Research Professorships
summary_en: New Vilas Research Professors include leaders in study of cells, public opinion, sustainable chemistry and computational optimization
title_cn: 4名威斯康星大学学者获授维拉斯研究讲席教授
